case_title: MARK LISTER C. MARTINEZ VS. WEI LI

docket_entries.description: PTFF'S REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, MARK LISTER C. AS TO DEFENDANT LI, WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, WEI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAR-22-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT, ON IT'S OWN MOTION, VACATES IT'S ORDER OF DISMISSAL; CONTINUED FOR TRIAL; DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MARK LISTER C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, WEI $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.07 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.07, THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH ANY ADDITION OR FURTHER LOANS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
